prompt:
Goal: Create a square educational fashion reference poster showing Han dynasty women's clothing in different forms, with eight photorealistic full-body female models wearing traditional Chinese Hanfu. Faces should be softly blurred or left featureless for privacy, while clothing, hairstyles, and accessories are highly detailed.

Canvas: Square 1:1 poster, clean off-white background with thin gutters between panels. At the top center, add the Chinese title 汉朝女子服饰  不同形制展示 in elegant dark brown calligraphy-style serif lettering, with small decorative flourishes on both sides.

Layout: Arrange exactly 8 vertical image panels in a 4 columns by 2 rows grid. Each panel contains one standing woman from about knees to head, centered, hands folded or gently holding sleeves, with a shallow-depth-of-field traditional courtyard or palace background. Each panel has a small vertical cream paper label near the upper left or upper right with black Chinese calligraphy, plus a short Chinese description in a translucent white strip along the bottom.

Eight panels, counted and labeled exactly:
1. 「曲裾深衣」 — white layered robe with wrapped curved front, pale peach sash, very wide sleeves, ornate floral updo, pink blossom courtyard background.
2. 「直裾深衣」 — rust-orange outer robe over cream inner layers, embroidered lapels, wide belt, long sleeve drape, dark wooden interior background.
3. 「襦裙」 — light sage-green short jacket over cream high-waisted skirt, crossed collar, peach waist ties, delicate gold hair ornaments, pale outdoor garden background.
4. 「袍服」 — rich coral-red robe with floral embroidery, broad sleeves, layered collar, gold hairpins and dangling ornaments, warm lantern-lit interior.
5. 「襦裙」 — pale lavender jacket and skirt ensemble, soft translucent wide sleeves with subtle floral embroidery, silver-pink sash, dark traditional architectural background.
6. 「交领襦裙」 — ivory and light mint crossed-collar top with flowing skirt, muted rose waist belt, layered sleeve edges, floral hair accessories, courtyard corridor background.
7. 「大袖衫」 — cream-gold large-sleeved robe with peach embroidered collar and wide sash, ceremonial elegant silhouette, candlelit palace background.
8. 「对襟襦裙」 — white front-opening jacket and skirt with black and red trim, dark red sash, restrained sleeve embroidery, traditional lattice-window background.

Visual style: Photorealistic historical costume photography, soft natural light, shallow depth of field, warm neutral color grading, detailed silk, gauze, embroidery, brocade borders, sashes, hairpins, floral crowns, dangling tassel ornaments, and Tang/Han-inspired courtly styling. Keep the models similar in pose and scale for comparison.

Text content: Use Chinese characters only for the main title, panel labels, and small bottom captions. The bottom captions may be short, handwritten-style explanatory Chinese text; keep them legible-looking but not overly dominant.

Constraints: Exactly 8 panels and exactly 8 women, no extra people, no modern clothing, no weapons, no logos, no watermark, no photorealistic facial identity; emphasize intricate embroidery, layered silk textures, and accurate draping.
